subtitle.en: Recover the Time Core before the school collapses into a time loop.
subtitle.es: Recupera el Nucleo del Tiempo antes de que la escuela colapse en un bucle temporal.

footer.en: Teacher mode: project this screen and guide team discussion.
footer.es: Modo profesor: proyecta esta pantalla y guia la discusion del equipo.

setupDescription.en: Enter the names of all participants. Turns will rotate automatically.
setupDescription.es: Ingresa los nombres de todos los participantes. Los turnos rotaran automaticamente.

setupError.es: Completa todos los nombres de participantes.

searchFirst.en: Search the room first. You still need the hidden clue.
searchFirst.es: Primero explora la sala. Aun necesitas la pista oculta.

incorrect.en: Incorrect. Turn passes to the next participant.
incorrect.es: Incorrecto. El turno pasa al siguiente participante.

completedDescription.en: The Time Core is stable. Your team saved Chrono Academy.
completedDescription.es: El Nucleo del Tiempo esta estable. Tu equipo salvo la Academia Chrono.

description.en: A locked cabinet guards the first fragment of the Time Core.
description.es: Un gabinete cerrado protege el primer fragmento del Nucleo del Tiempo.

objective.en: Choose the correct tense to unlock the cabinet.
objective.es: Elige el tiempo verbal correcto para abrir el gabinete.

question.en: Yesterday, the principal ____ the emergency protocol.
question.es: Ayer, el director ____ el protocolo de emergencia.

hints.en: Look at the time marker: yesterday.

description.en: A projection map shows four routes, but only one reaches the reactor safely.
description.es: Un mapa proyectado muestra cuatro rutas, pero solo una llega al reactor con seguridad.

objective.en: Pick the best synonym to decode route instructions.
objective.es: Elige el mejor sinonimo para decodificar las instrucciones de ruta.

question.en: Choose the best synonym for 'dangerous' in this context.
question.es: Elige el mejor sinonimo de 'dangerous' en este contexto.

hints.en: It describes a situation with possible harm.
hints.es: Describe una situacion con posible dano.

description.en: A coded vial is hidden in a cabinet with a biometric lock.
description.es: Un vial codificado esta escondido en un gabinete con bloqueo biometrico.

objective.en: Search the lab first, then solve the clue question.
objective.es: Primero investiga el laboratorio y luego resuelve la pregunta de la pista.

question.en: After searching, identify the correct sentence in passive voice.
question.es: Despues de buscar, identifica la oracion correcta en voz pasiva.

searchClue.en: You find a note: 'The formula is protected by passive structure.'
searchClue.es: Encuentras una nota: 'La formula esta protegida por estructura pasiva'.

options.en: The sample was mixed by the scientist.
options.es: The sample was mixed by the scientist.

options.en: The scientist is mixing the sample.
options.es: The scientist is mixing the sample.

hints.en: Passive voice usually uses 'be' + past participle.
hints.es: La voz pasiva suele usar 'be' + participio pasado.

description.en: The AI guardian asks a conditional question before granting access.
description.es: El guardian IA hace una pregunta condicional antes de dar acceso.

objective.en: Select the correct first conditional sentence.
objective.es: Selecciona la oracion correcta de primer condicional.

question.en: Choose the grammatically correct first conditional sentence.
question.es: Elige la oracion gramaticalmente correcta de primer condicional.

options.en: If we will hurry, we escape.
options.es: If we will hurry, we escape.

options.en: If we hurry, we will escape.
options.es: If we hurry, we will escape.

options.en: If we hurried, we will escape.
options.es: If we hurried, we will escape.

hints.en: First conditional: If + present, will + base verb.
hints.es: Primer condicional: If + presente, will + verbo base.

description.en: A hologram displays a dialogue with one missing response.
description.es: Un holograma muestra un dialogo con una respuesta faltante.

objective.en: Pick the option that best completes the conversation.
objective.es: Elige la opcion que mejor completa la conversacion.

question.en: A: 'Could you open the emergency gate?' B: '____'
question.es: A: 'Could you open the emergency gate?' B: '____'

options.en: Yes, I can do that right now.

hints.en: Answer politely to a request with modal 'could'.
hints.es: Responde de forma educada a una solicitud con el modal 'could'.

description.en: Star coordinates unlock the penultimate shield.
description.es: Coordenadas estelares desbloquean el penultimo escudo.

objective.en: Find the sentence with correct comparative form.
objective.es: Encuentra la oracion con forma comparativa correcta.

options.en: This route is more safer than that one.
options.es: This route is more safer than that one.

options.en: This route is safer than that one.
options.es: This route is safer than that one.

options.en: This route is safest than that one.
options.es: This route is safest than that one.

hints.en: Do not combine 'more' with -er for short adjectives.
hints.es: No combines 'more' con -er en adjetivos cortos.

description.en: The tunnel loops every 30 seconds unless you decode the signal.
description.es: El tunel se repite cada 30 segundos a menos que decodifiques la senal.

objective.en: Search the tunnel for a clue and solve the phrasal verb challenge.
objective.es: Busca una pista en el tunel y resuelve el desafio de phrasal verbs.

question.en: Choose the best option: 'We need to ____ the alarm before it rings again.'
question.es: Elige la mejor opcion: 'We need to ____ the alarm before it rings again.'

searchClue.en: A wall inscription says: 'The correct phrasal verb means deactivate.'
searchClue.es: Una inscripcion en la pared dice: 'El phrasal verb correcto significa desactivar'.

title.es: Escena 8: Portal del Nucleo del Tiempo

description.en: Final lock: one logic sentence stands between the team and freedom.
description.es: Bloqueo final: una oracion logica separa al equipo de la libertad.

objective.en: Select the sentence with correct word order.
objective.es: Selecciona la oracion con orden correcto de palabras.

options.en: Always we check the clues carefully.
options.es: Always we check the clues carefully.

options.en: We always check the clues carefully.
options.es: We always check the clues carefully.

options.en: We check always carefully the clues.
options.es: We check always carefully the clues.

options.en: Check we always the clues carefully.
options.es: Check we always the clues carefully.

hints.en: Adverb of frequency usually goes before the main verb.
hints.es: El adverbio de frecuencia suele ir antes del verbo principal.
